app.title: Swiss Holiday Calendar Planner
persons.title: Persons
persons.name: Name
holidays.label: Label
holidays.placeHint: Click a start date on the calendar and drag to adjust position.
leaves.title: Leave
leaves.label: Label
layout.label: Layout
year.label: Year
lang.label: Language
backup.title: Backup & Export
backup.icsHint: ICS files can be imported into Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, and Outlook.
backup.pdfHint: PDF with calendar view and QR code for sharing.
pdf.qr.title: Scan to load this calendar
pdf.qr.desc: Scan the QR code to open this calendar in your browser.
reset.title: Reset calendar
reset.warning: All manually entered data (persons, holidays, leave) will be permanently deleted.
reset.info: Cantonal public holidays and school holidays from the database will be reloaded automatically. All personal entries must be re-entered manually.
privacy.notice: Your data is stored exclusively in your browser. No data is sent to any server. When sharing via URL, data is encoded in the link. You are responsible for backing up your own data (use the Backup function).
share.import.title: Import shared calendar
share.import.warning: You opened a shared calendar link. Your current data (persons, holidays, leave) will be replaced with the imported data.
share.import.info: Create a backup first if you want to keep your current data.
about.title: Plan smarter, rest longer!
about.intro: Tired of checking five different places to see if your canton has a day off when the kids are on holiday? This calendar does it for you. Perfect for people who work in one canton but live or study in another.
about.feature.view: Personalized view: Choose the cantons you're interested in and compare them on one screen.
about.feature.clarity: Clarity: Intuitive color coding for public holidays, local holidays, and school breaks.
about.feature.family: Family support: Plan trips together without the risk of mixing up winter or spring break dates.
about.howto.title: How to use
about.howto.step1: Add a person — choose their name, category (worker, student, school pupil), and municipality.
about.howto.step2: The calendar automatically shows public holidays and school breaks for their region.
about.howto.step3: Add leave periods to see where everyone's time off overlaps.
about.howto.step4: Use Backup to save your data or Share to send the calendar to family members.
about.opensource: This project is free and open source under the MIT License.
about.bugs: The application may contain bugs. Please report errors, missing data, or suggestions via GitHub Issues.
